'''Vrokk''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] male and clan [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] of the [[Bolgoink clan]]. He was married to the clan matron [[Kufbrug]] and brother of [[Rog]]. Rog was married to Kufbrug's daughter, [[Gundruk]], and the pair arranged for Vrokk to be killed by a [[kheilwar]]. They arranged for the [[Clan boar|tusker]] [[Guth]] to be accused of his murder, but the former [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Callista Ming]] proved Guth's innocence.<ref name="MS" />
